creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Removed Levels, and added for rnd_jue

Walpurgis_Collection.zip
rnd_the_h_world.zip


Now can works both Options

OPTIONS_DEFINE= SYMLINK

OPTIONS_SINGLE= LEVEL
OPTIONS_SINGLE_LEVEL=   RnD RnD_jue

OPTIONS_DEFAULT=        RnD_jue

SYMLINK_DESC=   Symlink levels
RnD_DESC=       Levels default for Rocks'n'Diamonds
RnD_jue_DESC=   Levels default for R'n'D jue

.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSYMLINK} && ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRnD}

.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSYMLINK} && ${PORT_OPTIONS:MRnD_jue}


.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSYMLINK}


portlint -A
looks fine.


port test

ln: /var/tmp/ports/rocksndiamonds-data-20121229/share/rocksndiamonds/levels: No such file or directory

Because FreeBSD Port Tools not check dependencies.
